Arus kas negatif. Kurangi pengeluaran va: Negative cash flow. Reduce variable expenses or restructure installments to make monthly balance positive.
Rasio pengeluaran melewati 70% pemasukan: Expense ratio exceeds 70% of income. Prioritize basic needs and suppress lifestyle costs.
Rasio pengeluaran mulai tinggi. Sisihkan: Expense ratio is getting high. Set aside room for savings before adding new commitments.
Rasio tabungan dan investasi masih di ba: Savings and investment ratio is still below 10%. A healthy initial target is at least 10% of income.
Rasio tabungan cukup, tetapi masih bisa: Savings ratio is sufficient, but can still be improved towards 20% to accelerate financial targets.
Rasio cicilan di atas 30%. Pertimbangkan: Installment ratio is above 30%. Consider gradual repayment or refinancing before taking on new debt.
Rasio cicilan perlu dipantau. Jaga agar: Installment ratio needs to be monitored. Keep installments from exceeding 30% of income.
Dana darurat belum mencapai 3 bulan peng: Emergency fund has not reached 3 months of expenses. Build cash reserves before increasing investment risk.
Keuangan terlihat sehat. Pertahankan dis: Finances look healthy. Maintain budget discipline and re-evaluate at the end of each period.
Pengeluaran melebihi batas maksimal (:ma: Expenses exceed maximum limit (:max%). Reduce by :exceed% of income.
Pengeluaran lebih tinggi dari ideal. Per: Expenses are higher than ideal. Consider reducing to :ideal%.
Pengeluaran lebih rendah dari rekomendas: Expenses are lower than recommended. Good job!
Template untuk profesional muda dengan p: Template for young professionals with moderate expenses
Template untuk fokus tabungan dan invest: Template focused on savings and investment
Template untuk pengeluaran minimal dan t: Template for minimal and affordable expenses
Template untuk kepala keluarga dengan ta: Template for household heads with dependents
